title: Epson RC+ 8.0 package
description:
Epson RC+ 8.0 package

Simulator Specifications and Restrictions

This section describes the simulator specification, its restrictions, and precautionary statements.

Epson RC+ 8.0 package

Epson RC+ 8.0 has two packages:

Epson RC+ 8.0                : Standard package for developing the robot system

Epson RC+ 8.0 Trial        : Trial package for limited use (program execution on PC)

  * It cannot connect with a robot controller.

Simulation

+ 3D display

*1   Requires the configuration to enable the simulator functions in Epson RC+ 8.0.

Refer to Connection with controller for the detail information.

*2   Total execution time of program is limited.
